headline: Samsung Collaborations On 2nm And 3D‑IC Put Investor Focus On Valuation
summary: Samsung Electronics has expanded its collaborations with Synopsys and Cadence on next-generation chip design and manufacturing flows for its leading 2nm and 3D-IC technologies. The partnerships cover advanced electronic design automation tools, IP, and certified manufacturing processes aimed at AI, high-performance computing, and multi-die silicon solutions. These developments strengthen Samsung's foundry ecosystem at a time when demand for cutting-edge AI and advanced packaging solutions is...

headline: Citi’s Price Target On Synopsys (SNPS) Stock Still Carries Considerable Upside
summary: Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNPS) is one of the 10 Best High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM4) Value Chain Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Synopsys makes the advanced software necessary for designing and testing high-bandwidth memory-heavy AI chips. Analyst sentiment continues to stay positive on the stock. On May 28, Citi raised the firm’s target price on Synopsys […]

headline: Shares of software and AI cloud-related companies are trading lower amid possible sympathy with Oracle after the company reported Q4 financial results and announced a $40 billion financing plan for FY27. The financing needs to fund aggressive capex spending may be giving investors pause.
summary: NOW TEAM SNPS PTC IT FIG ADSK WDAY ZM
